Features

Everything you need
to do your best work

Designed for how humans actually work — not how productivity gurus think we should.

🧠

AI-Powered Daily Planning

Flowly learns your peak hours, energy patterns, and work style — then builds you the perfect schedule automatically.

  • ✓Smart time-blocking based on task type
  • ✓Learns your energy rhythms over time
  • ✓One-tap daily plan generation
📊

Deep Progress Analytics

See exactly where your time goes. Understand your streaks, identify bottlenecks, and celebrate wins with real data.

🎯

Goal Architecture

Break big ambitions into daily actions. Connect every task to a meaningful goal and watch the momentum build.

Good morning

Your day at a glance

Focus Time3h 24m
Tasks Done12 / 18
Streak🔥 14 days

NEXT UP

Deep work block — 2pm

How It Works

From chaos to
clarity in 4 steps

01

Download & Set Up

Takes less than 2 minutes. Tell us your goals, your schedule, and your energy patterns.

📲
02

Design Your System

Flowly builds a personalized productivity architecture based on your unique work style.

🏗️
03

Execute with Clarity

Every day starts with a clear, focused plan. No decision fatigue. Just flow.

⚡
04

Watch Yourself Grow

Track momentum, celebrate streaks, and iterate with real insights — not guesswork.

📈
Testimonials

People love
their new routine

"Flowly genuinely changed how I start my day. I used to spend 30 minutes figuring out what to tackle. Now it's just... there. Clear and obvious."

SC

Sarah Chen

Product Designer @ Vercel

"I've tried every productivity app. Flowly is the first one that adapted to me instead of forcing me into a system. The AI suggestions are eerily accurate."

MO

Marcus Okafor

Indie Hacker

"My team noticed I was shipping faster. Flowly helped me protect deep work time and stop context-switching every 20 minutes."

PN

Priya Nair

Engineering Manager @ Stripe

"The streak system is deceptively motivating. 47 days and counting. I don't want to break it."

JP

James Park

Freelance Developer

"I was skeptical of 'AI scheduling' but Flowly understands that I do creative work better at 10pm. No other app figured that out."

LM

Lena Möller

Head of Content @ Linear

"Between the analytics and goal tracking, Flowly is essentially a co-founder for my personal productivity. Highly recommended."

TH

Tariq Hassan

Startup Founder

Pricing

Simple, honest pricing

No tricks. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

Free

$0/forever

For curious individuals getting started

  • ✓3 active habits
  • ✓7-day history
  • ✓Basic analytics
  • ✓Daily planning
  • ✓Email support
Most Popular

Pro

$9/per month

For driven people serious about growth

  • ✓Unlimited habits
  • ✓Full history
  • ✓AI insights
  • ✓Goal architecture
  • ✓Smart scheduling
  • ✓Priority support
  • ✓All integrations

Team

$29/per team/month

For high-performance teams

  • ✓Everything in Pro
  • ✓Up to 20 members
  • ✓Team analytics
  • ✓Shared goals
  • ✓Admin dashboard
  • ✓Slack integration
  • ✓Dedicated CSM
🎉 Launch Offer

Start your best
chapter today.

Join 50,000+ people who chose to work smarter. Free forever. No credit card required.

iOS 16+ · Android 12+ · Free to use, always
